summary: Full-stack developer focused on building secure, scalable systems with strong automation, real-time communication, and clean architecture.

duties.title: Backend Development
duties.description: Designing and implementing backend services, APIs, and core business logic with scalability and maintainability in mind.

duties.title: Frontend Development
duties.description: Building responsive frontend interfaces and integrating them with backend APIs.

duties.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
duties.description: Managing containerized services, deployments, and server configuration.

achievements.title: Permission System from Scratch
achievements.description: Designed and implemented a complete role and permission system, including admin and non-assignable super-admin roles.
achievements.impact: Enabled fine-grained access control and significantly improved platform security.

achievements.title: Real-Time Server Communication
achievements.description: Implemented real-time communication between frontend and backend to instantly reflect server-side changes on the UI.
achievements.impact: Improved user experience by eliminating unnecessary refreshes and delays.

achievements.title: CI/CD & Configuration Management
achievements.description: Implemented CI/CD pipelines and structured configuration management across services and environments.
achievements.impact: Reduced deployment errors, improved release speed, and simplified environment management.

achievements.title: Real-Time IoT Communication & Device Control
achievements.description: Implemented real-time communication with IoT devices using MQTT to monitor, control, and exchange data between servers and connected hardware.
achievements.impact: Enabled low-latency, reliable device control and live state synchronization between physical devices and the platform.

images.alt: MQTT communication flow between server and devices

systems.name: 3smax
systems.description: Main company platform consisting of multiple services and internal tools.

systems.name: TMS Platform
systems.description: Internal transaction management system composed of multiple backend and frontend services.
